title: asterocephalus columbaria
intro: Asterocephalus columbaria, also known as Bird's Eye, is a plant species native to South Africa, characterized by its yellow or white flowers and long, thin stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Asterocephalus columbaria include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as serving as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions made from the leaves and flowers, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams for various health applications.
